caption: A man and a woman stand on a light-colored stage in a room with a plain white wall and rows of empty blue and gray chairs in the foreground. The man on the left wears a dark navy suit, and the woman in the center wears a dark cardigan over a pink top and light-colored trousers. A second man, wearing a camouflage-patterned shirt and dark trousers, stands to the right. Each person is positioned behind a tall, white, round pedestal table equipped with a microphone and a clear bottle of water. To the far right, a vertical blue banner features an image of hands and the legible text "PRAKTIJK EN ZORGVRAAG". The "mediasite" logo is visible in the top center of the scene. Across the sequence, the individuals remain in their positions, with the woman gesturing slightly with her hands while speaking and the men standing attentively, maintaining a formal presentation setting.
